chunks.title: Arrival and Complaint
chunks.reason: Describes the arrival at Sinai and the people's grumbling about hunger.

chunks.title: Promise of Provision
chunks.reason: Moses and Aaron speak to the people followed by Yahweh's direct instruction.

chunks.title: The Manna Appears
chunks.reason: Narrative of the quails arriving and the first gathering of manna.

chunks.title: Instructions for the Sabbath
chunks.reason: Details regarding the double portion on the sixth day and the rest on the seventh.

chunks.title: Naming and Preservation
chunks.reason: Describes the appearance of manna, its storage in a jar, and duration of consumption.
